---
title: "NSC-R Tidy Tuesday Workshop"
description: |
  Improve your R skills in entertaining, inspiring and supportive sessions moderated by your own colleagues.
author:
  - name: Danielle van Westbroek-Stibbe
    url: https://nscr.nl/medewerker/danielle-stibbe-msc/
date: 10-31-2023
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---
The NSC-R Tidy Tuesday workshop sessions are inspired by the [Tidy Tuesday](https://www.tidytuesday.com/) initiative, which is aimed at providing a safe and supportive forum for individuals to practice their data processing and visualization skills in R while working with real-world data. 

This workshop (October 31, 2023, 13:00-14:00) will be led by Danielle van Westbroek-Stibbe. 

Join this online workshop on Zoom [here](https://us02web.zoom.us/j/87671700917?pwd=aThJWkpzNEtESE40M2VzdnlodXEzdz09) (meeting ID: 876 7170 0917, Password: 455700)


> **Danielle van Westbroek-Stibbe** is a PhD candidate at NSCR and Utrecht Universiteit and a member of the NSC-R Workshops team. Her research focuses on cybercriminal decision-making.
